CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoActor: You do not have an owned Hero character to shop with.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.MessageExpirationHint: How long shop invite messages and buy/sell approval requests stay in chat before they automatically delete themselves. Set to 0 to disable and keep messages forever.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.DeleteShopConfirm: Delete this shop? This cannot be undone.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.CannotDeleteDefault: The default shop cannot be deleted.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.DropHint: Drag items here from the world, a compendium, or an actor sheet to add them to this shop.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SelectCustomFirst: Switch this shop to Custom Item List before adding items.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.DefaultModeHint: This shop draws its stock from the system's default Equipment compendiums - the same items available during Hero character creation.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SelectPlayersFirst: Select at least one player to whisper the invite to.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.AffordableOnlyHint: Only show items you can currently afford.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoAffordableItems: You cannot afford anything matching the current filters.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SetCurrency: Click to set this actor's currency
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.RandomizeUnavailable: This version of Crucible does not expose an item randomizer.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.RandomizeSuccess: Added {count} generated item(s) to the shop.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ImportPacksHint: Which compendium pack(s) to pull items from. Defaults to the system's Equipment compendiums.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ImportItemTypesHint: Only add items of these types (e.g. check just Weapon and Armor). Leave all unchecked to add every type.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ImportPriceOnlyHint: Skip items that have no price set - these can't be bought or sold anyway.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ImportSelectPackFirst: Select at least one compendium to import from.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ImportNoneAdded: Nothing matched those filters, or everything matching is already in this shop.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.BuyRateHint: The percentage of an item's listed price players pay to buy it here (e.g. 80 for 80% of value, a discount; 120 for 120% of value, a markup).
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.BuyRateNotice: Items cost {buyRate}% of their listed price here.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SellRateHint: The percentage of an item's listed price a player is paid when selling it to this shop (e.g. 50 for half value; 120 for above value).
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SellRateNotice: This shop pays {sellRate}% of an item's listed price when you sell to it.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoSellableItems: You have nothing this shop will buy.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SellNone: You haven't selected anything to sell.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SellRestockNotice: {name} sold an item to a shop - restocking now that a GM has picked this up.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.RequireApprovalHint: If enabled, buying or selling in this shop sends a request to an online GM instead of applying instantly. The player waits until a GM approves or denies it.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.AwaitingApproval: Waiting for a GM to approve this transaction...
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoGMOnline: No GM is currently online to approve this transaction. Try again once one is.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.RequestFailed: This request could not be applied (e.g. insufficient funds).
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ApprovalMethodHint: How a GM is asked to approve/deny a transaction on shops that require it.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ApprovalMethodChat: Chat whisper only (Approve/Deny buttons in the chat message)
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.ApprovalMethodBoth: Both - chat whisper and Shop Manager panel
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SeeShopManager: Check the Shop Manager's Pending Requests panel to approve or deny this.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoPendingRequests: Nothing waiting on approval for this shop.
